javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Interface ResourceContainer

All Superinterfaces:
AllocationEventNotifier, MediaObject, java.io.Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
MediaGroup, MediaMixer, MixerAdapter, NetworkConnection
public interface ResourceContainer
extends MediaObject, AllocationEventNotifier, java.io.Serializable

Gathers the set of methods to control a container of media Resources.

Method Detail

triggerAction

void triggerAction(Action rtca)
Triggers a RTC action, requested by the application.

This method allows the application to cause the immediate triggering of an RTC action. The action will be reported as being caused by MANUAL_TRIGGER.

Parameters:
rtca - an Action for a recognized RTC action.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the container has been released

getResource

<R> R getResource(java.lang.Class<R> resource)
              throws MsControlException
Return a handle on a resource of type resource.

Throws:
MsControlException - when this resource has not been configured into this container.

getConfig

MediaConfig getConfig()
Returns:
The MediaConfig of this container

confirm

void confirm()
             throws MsControlException
Request that all pending allocations/initializations are completed.
This method returns immediately, and the completion of the operation is signaled to the application by an AllocationEvent sent to the AllocationEventListener that the application must have registered with addListener.

When a confirm is "pending" (in the timeframe between the call to confirm() and the posting of the completion event), the application should not make other API calls. Implementations may throw WrongStateException in this case.

Throws:
java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the container has been released
MsControlException
